title: Top College for B.A (Hons.) Political Science in Noida
content: Political Science as a discipline is one of the most sought out courses in social science in recent times. It lays emphasis on understanding of the concepts, theory and practice of government and politics at local, national and international level. This course aims to provide students with a robust understanding of conceptual foundation of political science as a discipline. The course seeks to revolve around exploring contextual human behavior, philosophies, policy issues, movements leading to the understanding of political phenomena and the political world. Studying political science helps to develop skills to analyze strategic situation in politics and define new policy discourse for guiding the state and its people. The theoretical aspect of political science lays strong foundation of political concepts like freedom, liberty, equality, justice and as such create political awareness among people and enhance political justice and freedom in democracy. NOTE: For selected 3 Year Undergraduate programs, you have the option to continue for 4th year to obtain an Honours with Research Degree. XII with minimum 50% marks in aggregate Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.A (Hons) Political Science Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) 50% or above at XII level in Best Four relevant subjects 01 The graduates will be able to analyze and compare political concepts to implement political concepts. 02 The graduates will develop an ability to work efficiently as leader / team member with a holistic view. 03 The graduates will generate a culture of lifelong learning to achieve personal enrichment and professional ethics. 01 Create a strong knowledge base about political affairs 02 Relate to philosophical issues in political affairs 03 Help decode policies and their relevance 04 Explain the impact of political issues on individuals, groups and society 05 Facilitate critical learning, creative thinking and rational analysis 06 Connect theoretical constructs to real issues 07 Engage in intellectual discourses in socio-political affairs 08 Enable to gauge the links between politics and human values 09 Foster intellectual and positive analysis in individual and group activities 10 Discuss current affairs and make assessments. 01 Graduates will be able to analyze and optimize political concepts in the field of Higher Education and Research. 02 Graduates will develop the ability to work efficiently as leader/team member with an integrated view as Civil Services, researchers, lawyers or media persons. 03 Graduates can explore careers in Social activism, active politics or NGOs. 01 Identify and analyze the national and international political issues and ability to provide solutions. 02 Apprehend and evaluate the impact of political decisions, administrative policies and demonstrate the knowledge of political affairs. 03 Prepare professionals for meaningful participation in political engagements and communications. XII with minimum 50% marks in aggregate Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.A (Hons) Political Science Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) 50% or above at XII level in Best Four relevant subjects
